title: IGCAR Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 50 Junior Research Fellowship Posts
description: The Indira Gandhi Centre for Atomic Research (IGCAR), Kalpakkam, has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 50 Junior Research Fellowship Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech, M.Sc. in Computer Science, Electrical, Electronics, Mechanical Engineering can apply for the IGCAR Notification 2026 . The interested applicant...
